name: shift_intercept_design_sweep
description: Sweep manifest: run many engagement configurations without duplicating full config files. Every case is stored as a small delta (dotted 'fmu_id.param' overrides) on top of a single shared base master; the base is referenced once and content-hashed for provenance, so N configurations cost N small override dicts instead of N monolithic JSON files. 'cases' is an explicit list; 'grid' is expanded into the Cartesian product of the listed values and merged in. Set 'montecarlo.enabled' to run a dispersed P_kill campaign per case instead of a single deterministic engagement.
